chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-353 of 2022 (Ghulam Mustafa Shaikh Vs. P.O Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1.For Orders on CMA No. 7655/2023 (Ex./A) 2.For hearing of CMA No. 7656/2023 (Contempt/A) 07-02-2024. Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shaharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General. ******** It is stated by learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh that in terms of order dated 22-11-2022, the application of the petitioner has been disposed; consequently a bill worth Rs. 436,351/- has been forwarded to District Accounts Officer Khairpur for further action in accordance with law. By stating so, he filed copy of such application containing the subject bill. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the action does not press the listed applications, those are disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
